company.name: Company Name

company.notFoundDesc: This company may have been deleted or you may not have access.

contact.title: Title
contact.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this contact?
contact.deleteConfirmDesc: This contact will be permanently deleted. This action cannot be undone.

import.title: Import Data
import.uploadTitle: Upload a CSV or XLSX file
import.uploadDesc: Drag and drop your file or click to browse
import.defaultCompanyNameDesc: Used for rows where company name is empty. Leave blank to skip those rows.
import.matchNoneDesc: No common ID/Key or Website column found in both files. Please check your files.
import.orphanWarning: These people could not be matched to any company
import.matchZeroRows: No rows matched. Please check your files.
import.fileTooLarge: File size exceeds the 10 MB limit. Please select a smaller file.
import.fileInvalidType: Invalid file type. Only .csv and .xlsx files are supported.
import.fileRejected: File was rejected. Check its size and format.

report.title: Match Audit
report.empty: No matched records in this import.
report.legacyNoReport: No match details were stored for this import. The detailed audit is available for imports made after this feature.
report.truncatedNote: Showing {{shown}} / {{total}} rows. Download the CSV for the full list.

common.unsavedChanges: You have unsaved changes. Are you sure you want to leave?

filter.tryDifferent: Try different search terms or filters.

settings.title: Settings

smtp.title: Connect SMTP / IMAP Account
smtp.allowInvalidCert: Don't validate server certificate (for shared hosting)
smtp.testHint: The connection is tested before saving. Your password is stored encrypted.

settings.webhookDesc: Add this single webhook URL to your PlusVibe settings. Incoming replies are routed to the right account automatically by campaign.
settings.webhookGlobalNote: A single webhook URL serves all tenants; messages are routed automatically by campaign.
settings.webhookSecretHint: Also set your Webhook Secret in PlusVibe — it must match the PLUSVIBE_WEBHOOK_SECRET value on the server.
settings.ccDesc: Define CC addresses available when sending emails. Shared across PlusVibe replies and drip campaigns.

pipelineSettings.unsavedDesc: You have unsaved changes. Do you want to discard them?
pipelineSettings.deleteStageDesc: {{count}} companies are in this stage. Which stage should they be moved to?
pipelineSettings.noCompaniesInStage: No companies in this stage. It will be deactivated immediately.

people.title: People
people.noDataDescription: Add contacts or import a CSV/XLSX file.

dashboard.upgradeDesc: Upgrade to Pro to access pipeline funnel charts and more detailed analytics.
dashboard.noLocations: No geocoded locations yet. Open a company and click "Geocode Location" to add it to the map.
dashboard.noStageData: No stage data yet. Move companies to a stage and they will appear here.
dashboard.geocodeSuccessWithSkipped: {{geocoded}}/{{total}} companies added to map ({{skipped}} could not be resolved)
dashboard.geocodeNoneFound: No ungeocoded companies found in pipeline
dashboard.geocodeNoneFoundWithNoLocation: {{totalPipeline}} companies scanned — {{noLocation}} missing city info and cannot be geocoded
dashboard.geocodeNoLocation: {{count}} companies are missing city info and cannot be added to the map

bulk.terminalNotBulk: Outcome stages cannot be changed in bulk. Each company requires an individual closing report.

pipeline.upgradeDesc: Upgrade to Pro to access the Kanban pipeline board and track deals visually.

spotlight.noContacts: No companies with contacts in this stage

admin.title: Admin Panel
admin.userPasswordHint: Leave blank to keep current password
admin.userDeleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to permanently delete this user? This cannot be undone.
admin.userDeactivateConfirm: Deactivate all memberships for this user?
admin.dailyDigestDescription: Email the team at 08:00 each morning with the day's scheduled follow-ups and meetings
admin.tenantDeleteConfirm: Are you sure? This will permanently delete all data for this tenant.
admin.membershipRemoveConfirm: Remove this user from the tenant?
admin.bulkDeleteDesc: Selected data types will be permanently deleted. This action cannot be undone.
admin.bulkDeleteConfirmLabel: Type the tenant name to confirm:
admin.bulkDeleteSelectType: Select at least one data type
admin.bulkDeleteSuccess: Done: deleted {{companies}} companies, {{contacts}} contacts, {{activities}} activities, {{email_replies}} email replies

activity.summaryPlaceholder: What happened or what needs to be done?

closingReport.title: Closing Report
closingReport.required: Closing report is required for this stage

activity.dateRequired: Please select a valid date and time
activity.invalidDate: Invalid date format, please select again
activity.tierRequired: Activity timeline is available on the Pro plan

emailReplies.noEmailsForCompany: No emails linked to this company yet

stats.interestedTooltip: Conversations whose latest message is labeled 'Interested'
stats.awaitingTooltip: Conversations where the ball is in your court — not yet replied (auto-replies excluded)

stats.openedContext: of {{sent}} sent · {{pct}}% open rate. Covers only mails sent from your connected mailbox (Gmail or SMTP); PlusVibe campaigns are not included.

actions.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this reply?

rematch.noMatch: No automatic match found. You can assign manually.

assign.title: Assign to Company
assign.warning: This reply has not been matched to any company yet. Please assign manually.

emailReplies.importPartialFailed: {{count}} campaign(s) could not be imported: {{names}}. You can try again.
emailReplies.importUpToDate: All replies are up to date
emailReplies.noDataDescription: Replies from PlusVibe campaigns will appear here.

errors.loadFailedDescription: There was a problem fetching data. Please refresh the page or try again later.
errors.readToggleFailed: Could not update read status. Please try again.
errors.stageUpdateFailed: Could not update stage. Please check your connection and try again.
errors.assignFailed: Could not assign company. Please try again.
errors.deleteFailed: Could not delete reply. Please try again.

reply.title: Send Reply
reply.draftSaved: Draft saved — a note was added to the activity timeline

forward.title: Forward Email
forward.notePlaceholder: Note to add (appears above the original message)
forward.hint: The original email is automatically appended below your note.

compose.title: New Email
compose.toPlaceholder: Search a contact or type an email
compose.subject: Subject
compose.noConnection: To send email, connect a Gmail account from Settings > Email Connection first.

attachments.label: Attachments
attachments.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this attachment? It will be removed for all users.
attachments.dropHint: Drag a file here or click to select
attachments.deliveryHint: Files are sent as real attachments where the channel supports it, otherwise as a download link.
attachments.emptyLibrary: No saved attachments yet. Upload a file or add a link below.

attachmentLibrary.title: Email Attachments & CC Addresses
attachmentLibrary.description: Files and links you add here can be attached when composing or replying to mail. No need to send a mail.

errors.timeout: Request timed out, please try again
errors.unauthorized: Session expired, please sign in again
errors.forbidden: You don't have permission for this action
errors.generic: Something went wrong, please try again

campaigns.dripDesc: Automated email sequences you build inside the app.

prefixRules.title: Prefix Matching Rules
prefixRules.desc: Campaigns whose name starts with this prefix are auto-assigned to the matching customer (e.g. "NTR" → Naturagen).
prefixRules.empty: No rules yet. Add a prefix to get started.

campaigns.notConfiguredDesc: To view campaigns, enter your PlusVibe API key and Workspace ID in Settings > Integrations.
campaigns.connectionError: Could not connect to PlusVibe. Please check your API key.
campaigns.noAssignedDesc: No campaigns have been assigned to you yet. Contact your administrator.

campaign.createFirst: Create your first campaign to start sending automated email sequences.
campaign.subject: Subject
campaign.emailConnectionDesc: Connect your Gmail or Outlook account to send campaign emails.
campaign.emailConnectionDescMulti: Connect your Gmail/Outlook account or add your own SMTP server. You can add multiple accounts.
campaign.noConnectionHint: No connected account yet. Connect at least one account to send campaigns and emails.

editor.spintaxTitle: Spintax — one is picked at random
editor.bodyPlaceholder: Write your email content... HTML supported.
editor.saveFirstHint: Save the campaign to unlock the Audience and Analytics tabs.
editor.addFirstStep: Add your first step using the button on the left.
editor.firstStepNote: Sent as soon as the contact is enrolled.
editor.previewNote: Preview uses sample data (e.g. Ahmet, Acme A.Ş.).
editor.typeHint: Tip: you can also type variables and spintax (random pick) by hand.

graph.waitNote: Pauses before moving on to the next step.
graph.selectNode: Select a node on the canvas to edit it.
graph.conditionNote: Waits, then checks the contact and splits into Yes / No branches.
graph.connectHint: Drag from a node’s dot to another node to connect; click the × on a line to disconnect.

editor.testNote: Spintax and variables are filled with sample data (e.g. Ahmet, Acme).

settings.title: Campaign Settings
settings.savedHint: Live fields are saved; fields marked "Soon" will go live in an upcoming update.
settings.scheduleDesc: Send emails only within the selected days and time range, in this timezone.
settings.limitsDesc: Protect your domain reputation by capping send volume.
settings.dailyLimitNote: Maximum number of emails this campaign sends per day.
settings.perInboxLimitNote: Maximum emails each sending mailbox sends in a day.
settings.jitterNote: Adds a random gap of 0 to this many minutes (down to the second) before each send, breaking up robotic timing.
settings.accountsDesc: Spread the campaign across multiple connected inboxes to protect each one's reputation.
settings.accountsHint: Leave empty to use the default mailbox. With multiple, contacts are spread across them and each contact always gets the same inbox.
settings.senderNamesHint: These names apply across all campaigns.
settings.ccDesc: Carbon-copy (CC) addresses added to the email.
settings.ccHint: A copy of each contact's email is also sent to these addresses.
settings.trackingDesc: Toggle open and click tracking for this campaign.

list.deleteConfirm: "{{name}}" will be permanently deleted. This cannot be undone.
list.deleteOnlyDraftHint: Only draft campaigns can be deleted.

audience.showingNote: Showing {{shown}} of {{total}}. Use "Enroll all" for the rest.
audience.removeConfirm: {{name}} will be removed from this campaign and will receive no further emails.
audience.bulkRemoveConfirm: {{count}} selected contacts will be removed from this campaign.

activation.title: Ready to activate?
activation.audienceEmpty: No contacts yet (you can add later)

stats.trackingOff: Open and click tracking is not configured, so these counts may stay at zero. Replies are still tracked.

feedback.title: Feedback
feedback.submitted: Your feedback has been received. Thank you!

placeholders.featureTitle: What feature would you like to see?
placeholders.featureDescription: How do you expect this feature to work?
placeholders.bugDescription: How can we reproduce the bug? What did you expect, what happened?

errors.submitFailed: Could not submit feedback. Please try again.

setup.title: PlusVibe API
setup.configuredViaEnv: PlusVibe API is configured via server environment variables.
setup.notConfigured: PlusVibe API is not configured. Set PLUSVIBE_API_KEY and PLUSVIBE_WORKSPACE_ID env vars.

report.panelDesc: Downloads a summary XLSX report for the selected month.
